---
title: 'Word: It''s Time'
date: '2015-09-20T09:05:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6962386725911635737'
blogger_filename: '/2015/09/word-its-time.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Word From God'
---

3.37 am ct - AWAKE - in a good way<br />
<br />
I feel His presence in the house, like I haven't in a long time.<br />
<br />
I came to my prayer chair, and I heard this:<br />
<br />
"It's time. It's time. It's time. It's time, for an increase in responsibility and influence.
